chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.971 of 2026 Cr. Bail Application No.1236 of 2026 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah Applicants:- Nisar in Cr. Bail Application No.971/2026 and Nawab Raise in Cr. Bail Application No.1236/26 through Mr. Zaheer Ahmed Shar, advocate. Respondent:- The State through Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General. Date of hearing:- 13.05.2026 =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicants were arrested on 19.12.2025 by a police team of P.S. Chakiwara, Karachi, headed by SIP Muhammad Akram from Mirza Adam Khan Road and from them allegedly 19 grams and 17 grams ice were recovered, hence they were booked in the present case viz. Crime No.402/2025, u/s 9 of Sindh CNS Amended Act 2024, registered at PS Chakiwara, Karachi. 2. Applicants’ counsel has pleaded for bail on the ground that offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of section 497 Cr PC; and that applicants are no more required for further investigation. 3. On the other hand, Learned APG has opposed bail. 4. Notwithstanding, the investigation of the case is over. The applicants are no more required for further investigation. The offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of section 497 CrPC. The bail in such cases is rule and refusal an exception. Therefore, these bail applications are allowed and applicants are granted bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each and PR Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial Court. 5. The Bail Applications are disposed of accordingly. The observations herein above are tentative in nature and shall not affect the case of either party on merits before the trial Court.

The Bail Applications are disposed of accordingly. The observations herein above are tentative in nature and shall not affect the case of either party on merits before the trial Court. JUDGE hanif JUDGE
